content.json:
# Windows Firewall — Blocked Connections (EventID 5157)
**MITRE ATT&CK:** T1562.004 Impair Defenses
**Theme:** Windows Firewall deny parsing · **Data source:** `SecurityEvent` (EventID 5157 — WFP blocked a connection).

Parses 5157 events into source→destination, blocking application, and external-source views. Fields are extracted from `EventData` XML.

> Requires Windows Filtering Platform connection auditing enabled (Filtering Platform Connection, failure).

content.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 5157 | extend SrcAddr=tostring(EventData.SourceAddress), DstAddr=tostring(EventData.DestAddress), DstPort=tostring(EventData.DestPort), App=tostring(EventData.Application) | summarize Blocks=count() by SrcAddr, DstAddr, DstPort | top 100 by Blocks desc
content.title: Blocked connections by source → dest:port

content.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 5157 | summarize Blocks=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Computer | render timechart
content.title: Blocked connections over time by host

content.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 5157 | extend App=tostring(EventData.Application) | summarize Blocks=count() by App | top 50 by Blocks desc
content.title: Top blocking applications

content.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 5157 | extend SrcAddr=tostring(EventData.SourceAddress) | where not(ipv4_is_private(SrcAddr)) | summarize Blocks=count() by SrcAddr | top 50 by Blocks desc
content.title: External (public) source IPs blocked
